title: Visual Barriers
description: See barriers with the press of a key. There is no registry mismatch meaning you can use it in singleplayer without others needing the mod. Like visible barriers but only barriers
body:
Allows you to see barrier blocks with the press of a button (default: b). This mod can be used in singleplayer and allow other players without the mod to join. The barriers will act like glass where you can't see the backside of it and they cull together so you can see through multiple block thick barrier walls easily. 

You can change the texture of the barriers to a more familiar one at the resourcepack location: **visual_barriers:textures/block/barrier**

## Showcase
